shaders_fixed.issue: writes vec4<f32>(0.0) to writeTexture, breaking layer chain
shaders_fixed.fix: now passes through input video color while storing volumetric data in dataTextureA for Pass 2

shaders_fixed.issue: writes vec4<f32>(0.0) to writeTexture, breaking layer chain
shaders_fixed.fix: now passes through input video color while storing volumetric data in dataTextureA for Pass 2

shaders_fixed.issue: writes vec4<f32>(0.0) to writeTexture with comment 'Minimal color output'
shaders_fixed.fix: now passes through input video color while storing field data in dataTextureA for Pass 2

shaders_fixed.issue: writes vec4<f32>(0.0) to writeTexture with comment 'Write minimal output'
shaders_fixed.fix: now passes through input color from readTexture while storing velocity in dataTextureA

notes: All 4 multi-pass Pass 1 shaders had the same pattern: they stored intermediate data in dataTextureA but wrote zeros to writeTexture.
This caused the next shader in the chain (Pass 2 or any shader in the next slot) to receive black/empty input.
Fix applied: Sample the input texture (videoTex or readTexture) and pass it through to writeTexture.
The intermediate data is still correctly stored in dataTextureA for the Pass 2 shader to read.
Depth pass-through was already correct in all shaders.
Pattern to watch for in future multi-pass shaders: textureStore(writeTexture, gid.xy, vec4<f32>(0.0)) is almost always wrong for Pass 1 shaders.
